ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to appear at Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference on 8/17/2010 is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Dismissal on file. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Continued To Oct-28-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF for failure to appear at the Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference on August 17, 2010 is continued to 10/28/2010 at 10:30 AM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Continued To Sep-30-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Livia Hsiao, Esq., for defendant and moving party: ALIOTO FISH COMPANY LTD
Santiago Andrade, plaintiff and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT ALIOTO FISH COMPANY LTD's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $300, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
